title: Our paper is one of the MIT Top 10 research stories of 2023!
body:
Our work on the development of multifunctional fibers for unraveling connections between the gut and the brain (Sahasrabudhe, et al., Nat. Biotechnol., 2023) is one of the MIT Top 10 research stories of 2023. Congratulations Atharva and co-authors!

Read the full story
